title: Roundabout: The JoJo Mod
description: A Jojo's Bizarre Adventure mod that interprets the world and power system of the anime into the world of Minecraft.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/63W67MwG2s4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
Roundabout is a mod by Hydraheads based on the popular anime Jojo's Bizarre Adventure, where ordinary people develop supernatural powers. Roundabout seeks to faithfully recreate the world of Jojo into the world of Minecraft, in a way that fits into the MC aesthetic and design philosophy. It expands the game's combat, building options, exploration, and world building, while having controls that are easy to understand and intuitive. 

The mod is finall released, alongisde the fourth stand: Magician's Red! Expect Part 7 and 8 content to come in anticipation for Part 7's anime release!

We have a [wiki](https://github.com/Hydraheads/RoundaboutMod) for in depth explanations!


![Stands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aeaa6f0a4eb9c82fb03a38425534fb949b57cedc.png)

In this mod, you can acquire stand powers by using a stand arrow. Stand arrows can be acquired through crafting with meteorites found across the world, but they can also be dug up through archaeology. By using 15 experience levels, you can give yourself a stand. The arrow tells you what stand it is holding when you first interact with it, and you can spend 1 experience level to randomly change it by sneaking when you interact with it. 

But other mobs can also be stand users- every mob has a 1 in 20 chance to spawn worthy of a stand. The stand arrow vibrates near worthy mobs, and if you use a bow you can shoot the mobs with it, making them acquire the stand that the arrow says it is holding.

When a peaceful mob acquires a stand, it will develop fighting instincts, so it can now defend itself. This means you can eventually breed for pets with stands, and maybe eventually have a village of only stand users. This works with mobs from other mods, too. The only limit is your imagination!

In addition -to this, 0.5% of all mobs have the chance to spawn naturally with a stand. This means you will occasionally stumble upon a monster that is harder to deal with, or an animal that fights back when you go to kill it. Just like in Jojo, only stand users can see stands, so you will be confronting the unknown until you yourself have a stand!

Press R by default to summon and desummon your stand, and sneak/crouch gives you access to even more moves. Often times, blocking does as well.

There are currently 13 stands in the mod (8 main, 5 secondary). Many more will be added over time.


# **Star Platinum:**
Star Platinum is a powerful, well-rounded stand that focuses on its incredible precision. It can zoom in like a sniper, and throw blocks and items with 100% accuracy very far away. It has powerful attacks, and the ability to stop time. Its throw ability is very good for building, and it can do big leaps giving it good mobility.


# **The World:**

The World is a stand that focuses on power, making it a less accurate Star Platinum that can dish out more attacks at a closer range. Like Star Platinum, it is useful for building and has good mobility. It can stop time for 9 whole seconds when its timestop is fully charged, giving you a lot of time to think and act.

# **Justice:**

Justice is a powerful fog based stands that lets you raise an undead army, necromancy style. You can control them like a 3rd person real time strategy game. You can shapeshift with fog, create illusion clones, drag people around from open wounds, and create illusionary structures made of fog blocks. It is every bit as powerful as the other stands.

# **Magician's Red:**
Magician's Red is a powerful fire based stand that can spread stand flames everywhere, and extinguish them all with the snap of a finger. It focuses on mid to long ranged attacks, and can keep foes at a distance with its explosive knockback. The stand can also be used to freely light up furnaces, blast furnaces, and smokers. The flames it creates are invisible to non stand users, much like the stand itself.

# **Ratt:**
Ratt is a ranged stand that can be placed like a turret or manually fired. Its main gimmick is the flesh melting, which decreases maximum health temporarily, and you can pick up flesh piles in buckets and even eat them! Ratt hangs out on your shoulder when not deployed, and can be used to zoom in like a scope.

# **Soft and Wet:**
A powerful and versatile stand. It can take away friction from the ground and on mobs making them slip and slide, sound from the ground or mobs so you can silently sneak into bases or through Ancient Cities safely, oxygen from the air while underwater or from another mob, and eyesight from entities. It can move liquids around, pick up items from the ground, move small mobs, and create temporary bubble walkways that you can climb like scaffolding.

You can enter shooting mode and fire off explosive bubbles, charging up your Go Beyond. You can also shoot item bubbles and pop then towards whatever you are facing to launch the items at your opponents. You can create a bubble barrage with underground bubbles and strike enemies with bubble encasement making them slowly float away.

You can protect your animals and villagers from fall damage by putting safety encasement bubbles over them, and pop them with shears or sharp objects. You can even equip one yourself to jump high, and swinging a sword sets you free. This stand does many, many things like all main stands in the mod, so press Y to check out its abilities.

# **Walking Heart:**

The Wall Walking Stand! Walk on walls and ceilings, turn your heels into a powerful rapid 7 block long attack that goes through walls! With heel spikes enabled, you don't slide on ice, you can avoid all knockback, and get critical hits on the ground! 

Explore the nether by running along the rooftop, and become a master of knockback with this stand.

# **Anubis:**

A fast and strong stand. However, it comes with a curse that possesses you and makes you go on a rampage! It needs to be purified with a cleric villager to obtain it as a true stand. To get the mysterious sword, you can find it via archaeology/wandering traders. You can also reach wave 3 of a raid in a rainless biome (deserts, savannah, etc) to fight a boss and acquire it.

Anubis lets you do special combos, and memorizes keyboard inputs for you to replay macro style! It gains exp faster, and increases your speed (leaving a slipstream for opponents to follow).

# **Cinderella:**
Cinderella is a stand that creates faces (known as visages in the mod) which let you look like popular Jojo characters. It also creates lipstick which can help you trade better with villagers, but don't forget to reapply it until you go to bed! Finally, it can inflict faceless on mobs, which softens them up for attacks, and makes creepers try to hide their faces in shame.

# **Achtung Baby:**

Use the power of invisibility to hide from mobs, expose ores, and sneak past your friends! Achtung Baby is the ultimate stealth stand, although it is balanced around the fact that using the burst of invisibility to sustain it exposes your location (to mobs and players). The stand even makes projectiles you shoot invisible. Note: on fabulous graphics, some visuals are reduced or simplified.

# **Survivor:**

A stand that makes mobs angry at each other. Start a brawl, direct your enemies away from you, or have them keep a mob spawner in check, the limit is your creativity! It becomes activated with bottles, water, or rain, and once activated it stays activated. You can also turn on rage cupid mode, and match enemies to fight each other. In creative mode, this replaces the need for mob battle mods, as you can make any mobs fight. Zapped mobs become faster as they move towards their targets, and slower as they move away. They also gain increased melee strength, and take reduced damage from sources that are not melee. 

# **Hey Ya:**
A true friend. It encourages you with nice words, helps you find ores, and you can toggle a mode to alert you when mobs aggro onto you.


# **Mandom:**
A stand with the ability to rewind time by 6 seconds! This includes the health/hunger/velocity/position/fire status/oxygen and many other values of many entities nearby. It does not rewind blocks or items (for anti duping sake). You can use it to always tell the ingame time in caves with its built in clock, and equip a fancy watch cosmetic with it. You can also press Z to see where your next time rewind will land you and all of the mobs around you to recall the past!


![Fates](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1115305/description_1ea74d20-bafa-4436-aa94-e05c575dc149.png)

Fates are essentially your "state of being" or "race" depending. They will include things such as cyborg, f, rock human, dog, and hallowed (saint corpse part absorded). They influence your moveset while your stand is desummoned but also have ups and downs to keep pure human viable. Some fates come with unique secondary movesets that replace stands which you can switch to, such as the vampire powers moveset. Currently there are only 2 unique fates in the mod apart from human.

Vampire:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/tOuQUh7h7u4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
Equip the stone mask found in shipwrecks/fishing/wandering traders and use a sacrificial dagger or other bleed item to transform into a vampire!

Become stronger by drinking blood just like in the series, unlocking skills of your choice as you level up! Create an army of zombie minions by killing villagers/illagers, and turn them into chimeras with the grafting skill!

Vampires have two movesets, their fate moveset and their powers moveset. You can mix and match your fate abilities with any stand in the mod, or lock into your vampires moveset with the power inventory key (Y) to use things likes ripper eyes and freeze. The list of what vampires can do is enormous and covers all of their abilities from the series, so check out the video or the wiki!

It is an entirely different playstyle that makes you insanely good at mining and living underground, it even has a different OST as an "evil route". Golems attack you on sight but zombies are neutral to you.

Vampires die in the sunlight, this is absolute and unpreventable, just like fate. Rejecting your humanity comes with a cost! Coffins and living underground or in the nether are your answer to this.



Zombie:



A curse upon your blood, if you die to a jojo zombie type mob (at the moment only player minions) or a vampire player's blood clutch attack, you transform into a jojo zombie! Zombies are lesser vampires with no leveling. They have a couple of unique abilities like hiding in mobs and shooting out knives from their body (which you first craft), but overall zombificiation is a curse. However, it lets you play to both sides, disguising to avoid golems and showing your true self to avoid zombies.


![Mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e88ab64398d68174d9c62e8de882f3e9266e3e0.png)

Terrier:

Based on Iggy from Part 3 of Jojo, which is a Boston Terrier. Terriers spawn somewhat infrequently in deserts, or occasionally in the same biomes wolves do. They are functionally identical to wolves, but occasionally make different noises and eat coffee flavored gum.


![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/605f09ea343808dfbbcd31bfcbd06090b81e094a.png)

Roundabout features a variety of items, with the goals of adding fun and decorative blocks, cool new weapons and combat options, and providing counters to overpowered vanilla features.

Knives:

Knives are crafted for the cheap price of one iron nugget and one stick. They can be thrown quickly individually, or in bundles of 4. They inflict bleed, and can stack up to do quite a bit of damage. Bleed is a status effect that fights against healing from eating food (saturation), so it is essential for pvp. Time stop shenanigans may ensue...

Glaive:

Based on the Harken Scythe mod, and the weapon Jack the Ripper uses in Part 1. Glaives are in between the speed and power of axes and swords. They can be charged by holding right click, and released to inflict bleed 2. Glaives leave blood puddles. Endermen bleed ender blood which teleports you if you step on it, and insect mobs bleed hemolymph which is sticky and slows you down as you walk over it.

Gasoline and Matches:

Gasoline cans can be thrown to paint the ground with gasoline. Gasoline slows down mobs that walk over it, and make it hard for players to escape. Once it makes contact with fire, matches, etc, gasoline explosions occur. They can be quite powerful, and set things on fire for a long time.

Locacaca:

Locacaca fruit grow in Jungles, and you can occasionally find their pits in shipwreck. Locacaca can be planted in the ground, and produce fruit when fully matured. You can then eat the fruit to fully heal yourself- but it comes at the cost of turning a body part to stone. If you break a fully matured locacaca plant, you get its branch, which you can then place on top of a cactus to start growing the new locacaca- which is essential to curing stone body parts. It reflects damage onto others with equivalent exchange.

And More:

Luck Sword is made from smithing, harpoons are found in Nether forts and have anti-air properties, scissors are fast bleed weapons that can sheer things, the stereo can play music discs- which roundabout adds more of, and barbed wires do damage to you based on the speed you run into them at. We even have the Joestar Family statue of the Goddess of Love.


![World Generation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94410f31a6aa57e74448651e89d4d40a788113d0.png)

Locaca fruits can grow in Jungles, locacaca are as seen in the items section!

Meteor Sites:

Meteor sites spawn throughout the world. They are one method of getting stand arrows. If you have difficulty finding them, meteorites also drop from stand user enemy mobs. Eventually, there will be medium and large meteor sites as well.

Aja Ores:

Spawn in deserts primarily, but also in lush caves. Aja ores make blocks that amplify nearby light sources like torches. The block of aja emites a redstone signal based on the strength of the light source touching them. Aja ores can be used to make UV blasters that burn undead mobs which are weak to sunlight. UV blasters also heavily damage jojo zombies and vampires. It takes the unleash the cold ability and the powers moveset being actively equipped for a vampire to resist this and stay powerful in player vs player encounters.

These are standard aja stones, not to be confused with the "super aja".

# **Meet the Dev Team:**
Lead Developer:
Hydraheads: sometimes known as Hydrabread, or simply Hydra. I am the creator of Jojovein, and the main coder of the Roundabout mod. I am a computer science major with a passion for game design, and I want to make a mod that people love to play! I hope you enjoy! ^^

Other Coders:
Prisma: Joined to create the glorious Ratt, is very cool! Works on other projects as well, such as Anubis, and is an active member of the dev team.

Chloe: Joined and started on bowler hat and road roller, very nice and friendly!

Fish: Working on Green day!

LucioArg: Starting on Metallica

Modeling and Animations:
GenericName: has created many models and animations, she has been a part of this journey from the beginning.

Psychoda: is a great modeler and chill dude, makes lots of stand models.

TubularBells: Another wonderful modeler/texture artist

DarkkJon: Another animator, who has contributed a lot of cool animations like stands getting barraged and the mining barrage. Thank you Jon, you're awesome.

FunkyKing: Another modeler, who offers much support. Really cool dude.

Sprite Art:
Blugnib/Cheeseballjack: Makes sprites for the mod, and they rock. Really feel like they fit into vanilla.

Shaders:
The wonderful time stop shaders were created by GoldenGate9!

Other Credits:
Ponzeli for the basis of the enya skin, Trace42 for the basis of the DIO skin, Zetalasis as a former coder who helped set up the config and uniform network packets, Loc for help on Justice code for a few Justice features
